capabilities_used.evidence: 图2把大箱体直接标成“Interested to sell here / Only interested to buy here”；图3写“2025 BOX”“Buy orders in white box 57-60k region”；多条推文反复给出箱体低位买入、高位卖出/做空。
他反复用“box”“sideway”描述市场结构，如 [2025-06-28] “Bitcoin always shows same behaviour Long sideway range for 8-9 months Out of sudden 30-50% increase”；[2025-11-23] “Sideway move starts in box till 2026”。
图5直接标注两次“$ Golden Cross $”；说明他把 50/200 均线金叉当作核心中期看多确认。
图6把均线称为“Golden Line”，多次用箭头标出价格回踩均线后的继续上行；[2025-04-28] “The golden line, the mother of bulls”。
[2025-07-16] “#ETH: One week ago pointed out the breakout of ETH above the MA50 on the weekly chart. Since then ETH is up 28%”；明显把收复关键均线作为趋势切换/加仓依据。
图7左侧直接贴了“Bear Flag”示意，并把当下结构映射为同类下跌延续；说明其会用空头旗形做中继下跌判断。
[2025-03-27] “#Bitcoin forming a massive rising wedge on the daily chart... The breakdown is coming close”；这是非常明确的上升楔形看空用法。
[2024-11-22] “I can see many short orders in the region of $100,000, market makers will tease this area”；[2025-02-25] 指控 ByBit/Binance/Wintermute 通过波动“cause mass liquidations on long/buyer side”。
他的“market makers tease levels / trap the retails first”叙事，本质是先扫流动性再走真实方向；[2026-04-09] “TRAP THE RETAILS FIRST, CRASH AFTER!”。
[2024-03-29] “Halving starts in two weeks, super cycle loading”；[2024-03-27] “we are going to enter halving cycle”；明显把减半作为周期框架核心。
[2024-07-28] Sunday report写“Today, we look into each Bitcoin cycle”；[2026-02-22] 图8与推文使用“Six Stages of the Bear Market”“Stage 4 out of 6”，说明他长期按周期分段而不是只看局部K线。
[2024-09-18] “Now all eyes on M2 money supply The FED is forced to print more Next months printers go crazy”；宏观流动性是其牛市论证的一部分。
[2024-10-31] “BlackRock just bought more than $875M worth of Bitcoin”；[2024-01-29] 提到资本流入未充分到来；他会把 ETF/机构流量当成需求代理变量。
他反复强调在极度亢奋区间顶部做空，如 [2025-10-22] “Predicted the exact top of $125,000”；图4把上方区域直接标成“Short and Selling Zone”，属于末端衰竭/分配思路。
图4、图8都在构建完整熊市阶段与下行通道叙事；[2026-03-27] “The bear leads with full strength”；他会明确把环境切换为熊市并采取持续偏空策略。
图6在均线上方连番支撑并给出“$116,000 - $120,000”目标；[2025-04-24] “The new leg up is loading”；强势趋势判定后会持续抱多。
虽然他公开内容更强调大方向，但在 [2026-04-09] 同时写“LONGING $BTC AT $71,750 ... TAKE PROFIT BETWEEN 79-84K SHORT ORDERS BETWEEN 79-84K”，说明会做分段执行与预设退出。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Forward Box Projection
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Draw a forward-looking horizontal box before price reaches it, then use the box low/high as the main buy-sell map. The box itself is treated as the core market structure, not just a support/resistance line.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 先把未来一段时间的横向箱体提前画出来，再用箱体下沿/上沿作为主要买卖地图。箱体本身被当作核心市场结构，而不是普通支撑阻力线。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图3的“2025 BOX”与图4对 2026 年后续箱体的前瞻绘制；[2026-02-05] “At the same time the box is created, it is designed and drawn forward-looking by the chart itself.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Bitcoin Production Cost Floor
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 比特币生产成本底部框架
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use Bitcoin production cost as a valuation floor. When spot trades below production cost, treat it as a historically asymmetric long opportunity.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把比特币生产成本当作估值底部。现货跌破生产成本时，视为历史上不对称的做多机会。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-02-25] “#Bitcoin production cost is now at $95,000 Current price is lower than production cost level Historically one of the best buying opportunities”；图1也在展示该指标。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Market Maker Trap Mapping
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Map likely zones where exchanges/market makers will first force liquidations on one side, then reverse or continue after weak hands are flushed out. This is broader than a single liquidation cluster and includes narrative psychology.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 标记交易所/做市商可能先清算一侧仓位、再反转或延续的区域。这比单一清算热区更宽，包含对市场心理和操纵节奏的判断。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-02-25] “The mafia of ByBit and Binance... mainly to cause mass liquidations”；[2025-05-31] “Market makers know exactly how to shake out the weak hands”；[2026-04-09] “TRAP THE RETAILS FIRST, CRASH AFTER!”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Six-Stage Bear Market Model
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Classify the bear market into sequential stages with different tactics: initial top/distribution, first leg down, trap rally/sideways box, capitulation, bottom formation, and recovery.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把熊市划分为连续阶段并对应不同策略：顶部/派发、第一波下跌、诱多反弹/横盘箱体、恐慌出清、筑底、复苏。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图8标题“The Six Stages of the Bear Market”；[2026-02-22] “Bitcoin is currently in Stage 4 out of 6 in the current bear market”。

personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 把箱体当作最高优先级结构，交易决策围绕箱体边界执行。

personal_quirks.quote: The golden line, the mother of bulls
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 关键均线是趋势是否继续的核心分界线，回踩不破偏向继续看多。

personal_quirks.quote: People will call you lucky in a few weeks if you show off your profits. They will never understand the balls you need to long right into a falling knife at absolute fear.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 在极端恐慌时反共识进场，但前提是他认为结构性底部/箱体低点已到。

personal_quirks.quote: TRAP THE RETAILS FIRST, CRASH AFTER!
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 市场经常先通过反向波动诱骗散户，再走主方向；要预判陷阱而非追逐第一段动作。

personal_quirks.quote: Never marry your bags and be able to take profits!
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 即使长期看多，也必须接受周期切换并在他定义的顶部区域兑现利润或反手。

unique_traits: 他和一般 TA 交易员的区别，是把“箱体结构 + 市场操纵/清算叙事 + 宏观流动性”揉成一个统一框架，而不是只画形态线。他非常强调前瞻性地先画未来箱体，再在箱体边界做高赔率反向交易。内容表达上高度戏剧化、强叙事、强自我验证，但底层方法其实相当固定：箱体、均线、周期、流动性陷阱。

high_conviction_phrases: TRAP THE RETAILS FIRST, CRASH AFTER!
There is no reason to be scared at all
The golden line, the mother of bulls
low_conviction_phrases: potential of an upside move in the short term
